// Fixture for sibling-switch test (task-085 Fix 1).
// CField::OnPacket contains TWO sibling switch statements at the same brace
// depth on the same opcode variable.  Ops from BOTH must be emitted.
// Opcodes in switch A: 0x70, 0x71, 0x72
// Opcodes in switch B: 0x80, 0x81 (sibling, same brace level as switch A)
void __thiscall CField::OnPacket(CField *this, CInPacket *a2)
{
  int op;
  op = CInPacket::Decode2(a2);
  switch ( op )
  {
    case 0x70u:
      CField::OnEnterField(this, a2);
      break;
    case 0x71u:
    case 0x72u:
      CField::OnLeaveField(this, a2);
      break;
    default:
      break;
  }
  // second sibling switch on the same variable at the same brace depth
  switch ( op )
  {
    case 0x80u:
      CField::OnUserMoveField(this, a2);
      break;
    case 0x81u:
      CField::OnSummonedEnterField(this, a2);
      break;
    default:
      break;
  }
}
